-- path: /repo/src/lib.rs
mod framework;
mod architecture;
-- path: /repo/src/framework.rs
pub fn has_import_path() {}
-- path: /repo/src/architecture.rs
use crate::framework::has_import_path;

include!("architecture/helpers.rs");
include!("architecture/rules.rs");

pub fn run() {
    shared_helper();
    has_import_path();
}
-- path: /repo/src/architecture/helpers.rs
fn shared_helper() {}
-- path: /repo/src/architecture/rules.rs
pub fn evaluate() {
    shared_helper();
    has_import_path();
}
